creator: drhowarddrfine@charter.net
text:
I tried doing 'make deinstall' but this failed in the same fashion. Now I tried 'make install' only to get this error:

===>  Installing for e2fsprogs-libuuid-1.43.3_1
===>  Checking if e2fsprogs-libuuid already installed
===>   e2fsprogs-libuuid-1.43.3_1 is already installed
      You may wish to ``make deinstall'' and install this port again
      by ``make reinstall'' to upgrade it properly.
      If you really wish to overwrite the old port of e2fsprogs-libuuid
      without deleting it first, set the variable "FORCE_PKG_REGISTER"
      in your environment or the "make install" command line.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/misc/e2fsprogs-libuuid
*** Error code 1
